methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Space & Aerospace (found 0 same-stage, 1 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 23 same-sector peers exist in Space & Aerospace, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Space & Aerospace P/S median is 49.8x across 6 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

data.narrative:
Argotec, a growth-stage Space & Aerospace company founded by David Avino, is targeting €75M in total capital raised. The valuation universe comprises 5 public comps (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and 8 private peers including SpaceX, Rocket Lab, Blue Origin, Planet Labs, and Firefly Aerospace—a 13-company reference set across the sector.

Peer-median triangulation is not applicable: while 23 same-sector peers exist, filtering by stage and valuation tier yields fewer than the three datapoints required for statistical reliability. Public-comp anchoring cannot proceed; the Space & Aerospace public universe shows a median P/S multiple of 49.8x across 6 tickers, but Argotec's revenue remains undisclosed, preventing ratio-based valuation. Neither standard method produces a defensible result from available data.

Without disclosed financials or a sufficiently dense peer cohort at matching maturity, quantitative triangulation cannot support a specific valuation range at this time. A forward valuation exercise would require either: (1) revenue or EBITDA figures for Argotec, enabling public-comp multiples; (2) a minimum of three private growth-stage Space & Aerospace peers with known valuations and comparable metrics; or (3) precedent transaction data from the sector. The €75M fundraise target itself serves as a floor expectation but does not constitute independent valuation support. Further diligence on operational metrics and comparable deal activity is necessary.
